segments.note: seg1: after two early snaps the read is sub-50% openers are run-killers. Floor mind 77% starts a mind chain (5 mind faces). Fangs refused — never corrupt a 1pt floor.
seg2: true mind 47% extends the chain AND pays 3 AND buys trade ink; stitch unspent. Mana single-face bottleneck; fang lastResort (corrupt would break the chain but a snap ends the run).

seg3 BOSS Fevered One: floor body 0.536 is the SAME number this hand/req priced with no warp in run1 — probe seems blind to the body-reroll warp, so real reach ~45%. Bloom mind 20% extends chain+royal but is a death sentence; survival play = floor, break the mind x2 chain, reach patron 2. lastResort fang: corrupt -12 < snap death.
seg4: true body 44% extends the body chain + 3pts + trade ink; floor spirit 50% would break chain for 1. Shift rider landed on a MIND face (blind drop after a deliberate park — odd feel).
seg5: true mind 47% over bloom body 15% (extend not worth death odds) and floor 33%/1pt. d2 is both my mana source and my lock-bane carrier — stated reach ignores bane friction.

seg6 BOSS Veiled One: bloom is a blank {veiled:true} — cannot be chased by directive (driver limit) and true spirit 24% is the twist bait. Floor body 54% = survival; chain break accepted; third corrupt still beats a snap (no knot exists).

seg7: Chain-Keeper contract (n=20, HIDDEN in state — legibility bug) is dead-on-arrival: body only appears at the 21% bloom tier this segment, and the line needs 3 straight body resolves. ~9% for +20 vs risking ~70 banked. Floor mind 89%, contract conceded, fangs refused.

seg8: contract dead (1+2<4). Bloom mind 27% extends chain + 6pts + ROYAL ink vs floor 65%/1pt chain-break. Bank (~100 w/ depth45) survives a snap, so the push risks future EV only; royal-draw info value is the tiebreaker. Stitch+Rope as rescue.

seg9 BOSS Chain-Keeper (contract already unmeetable): late-gate arrived — true is a PURE rung (voids on off-colour keeps) at 3%, shown as a bare pure:true flag with no explanation. Depth compounding makes survival king: floor body 54%.

seg10: bane-adjusted read — floor spirit 33% NEEDS the double-locked d2f1 (all 3 spirit faces), true body 20% rides 4 clean body faces + extends chain + Bodybound/Grin fire. Probes ignore debt friction; the player must not.

perks.note: ash: Shift = fizzle+rider on clean hand (trap again). Patient Needle +4/spare-spin-stop fits floor-first stop-at-target style better than Thousand Cuts +1-2 on thin keeps.
trade: Shift x2 with a CLEAN hand = fizzle+rider trap (verified headlessly the all-common streak is luck, not a weights bug). Thousand Cuts.

SHIFT ENGAGED (the FOCUS window): on_keep harsh lock sat on a charm face I sometimes keep for garnish; parked it on d5f0 FANG face — fangs are kept only at spins-out where a random lock is dead. Paid the mild Errant Spin rider (random face) for it. Cold-parking = timing, not colour.

trade uncommons at last. Refused BOTH ridered sigils — hand already carries 3 banes and each add is another on_roll chaos source; Knotted Rope (clean) buffs the exact thing killing my runs (snap rescue: stitch save +1 spin). Parked Spinlock fired harmlessly at spins-out this segment — cold-parking validated.

trade: Shift x2 refused AGAIN (all hand banes are on_roll — no timing trick exists; parking only pays vs on_keep). The Edge complements Patient Needle: spare-spin stops pay +4, spins-out resolves pay +5 — full coverage.

stitch-ash draw. Chain-Keeper jackpot (chain>=4 at patron end) REPRICES fangs: any load-bearing fang = corrupt = chain reset = contract dead, so Fang-Dancer (+4 per FREE-fang resolve, the cursed-line witness) is anti-synergy right now. Spiritbound as the long-run grower. Shift x2: on_roll banes, still no parking value.

stitch-ash, portrait full: FOUR dead-or-negative options (Shift x2 = +1 random bane each; Bloomkeeper payload is DEFERRED/inert this build; Deep Ink has no live prerequisite). Deep Ink over-inks Spiritbound (slot 4 named — bare pick would eat live Patient Needle). Banes outprice speculative witnesses here.

ROYAL draw: guaranteed rare+ rolled Augurs (blemished — the 40% rare pure roll failed; zero pure cards all session). Debtors Grin = the cursed-line witness (+2 per cursedSeg, I have 3) — clean, over-inks dead Deep Ink. Desc leaks raw var name cursedSeg (legibility bug). No face/bargain card in any of ~12 draws this session.

ash: Bodybound (live — body floors are my survival rung) over-inks Knotted Rope (2 fires, 0 score; its +1 spin lands the segment AFTER a save). Depth 84 banked and snap-proof — compounding > insurance. Shift refused (nothing parkable better; d2 double-lock is on_roll).
